---
title: "Hannah's Portfolio"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Welcome to my portfolio! This is a collection of all of my data stories from the semester in ESCI 222. We used data from a variety of sources to tell stories and not only present information, but be convincing and tell the story that is behind the information. Here I have stories on carbon emissions and energy use, education sending, water use, and tree composition in Sewanee.
